data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a scheduled start time with a check-in window. However, the evidence does not explicitly confirm that the check-in window is implemented or functioning as required. While the linked use case mentions a scheduled start time and a check-in process, there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks provided to validate that this requirement is fully covered, leading to a gap in the requirement satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of the scheduled start time with a check-in window.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add validation for scheduled start time and check-in window
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the scheduled start time includes a check-in window of 15 minutes prior.
